SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BASE RUM BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum COCKTAILS Blood Moon A quenching Halloween treat, the BACARDÍ Blood Moon rises tonight. Combining BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum with the tartness of blood orange and the fizz of ginger beer, this cocktail is eerily delicious and spookily satisfying. Be bold in red with this eerily delicious and spookily satisfying Halloween treat. How to make a Blood Moon Ingredients 30 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 30 ml Finest Call® Blood Orange Sour 89 ml ginger beer Servings Copy Blood Moon ingredients Copied! Blood Moon recipe One step at a time 1 Ice Fill a highball glass with cubed ice. 2 Add Add all ingredients. 3 Stir Stir to combine. 4 Garnish Garnish with a blood orange wheel or fangs. MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW OUR RECOMMENDED rum COCKTAILS Like This? Try These If this is your kind of cocktail, here’s our selection of other BACARDÍ cocktails that might suit your taste VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS Zombie Tropical Ghost Pineapple Potion Cookie Crusher Hurricane DRAG TO DISCOVER MORE VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS FAQ WANT TO KNOW MORE? How do you make rum? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended. What is the difference between dark, gold and white rum? Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Color can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavours that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But color can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself. SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone.
